resultList.dtldesc: Presenting an elegant 3 BHK penthouse for sale in the high-end Shilp Residency, Ahmedabad's booming area of Gota. This premium property is under development, with possession in June 2026.::::::Note - Rs 2.19 Cr (All Inclusive – Negotiable) is the price tag for this penthouse, providing a rare chance to purchase a high-end home in a desirable area.::::::Property specifications and facilities::::::Covering an impressive super built-up area of 3104 sq. ft, this penthouse is located on the 14th floor and is vaastu compliant with a west-facing view to offer stunning sunset views. On entering, you are greeted by a big foyer area measuring 15 ft × 21 ft, which paves the way for the expansive living experience ahead.::::::The floor plan comprises three spacious bedrooms, four western bathrooms (three individual and one shared), a spacious living room, and an efficient kitchen. A lovely balcony connected to the living room gives peaceful views over the garden, while a large private terrace of 19 ft × 26 ft (carpet area) gives added outside space with a view of the main road. The premises boast beautiful vitrified flooring from top to bottom, making the modern look shine through.::::::For parking convenience, two covered parking lots are also provided. Though there is 100% power backup for shared facilities like lifts, the residents can utilize a plethora of world-class amenities ranging from a clubhouse with gym to covered swimming pool, children's play area, landscaped garden, banquet hall, cricket pitch, library, indoor games area, senior citizen sit-out, and working-from-home zone.::::::The penthouse is positioned wisely with garden-facing rooms and an open balcony with unobstructed views of the main road, providing the best possible sunlight and air ventilation through its east-west entrance design. The balcony is also best for solar panel installation, providing maximum energy efficiency.::::::Locality::::::This prime location is in the immediate vicinity of renowned educational institutions like Nirma Vidyavihar, Hiramani School, SGVP School, LML School, St Mary School, and KNPIS School. An assortment of markets and amenities are easily accessible in the vicinity along the SG Highway with facilities like SGVP Hospital and KD Hospital for medical requirements. Public transport is readily available with city bus transport easily accessible along the highway.::
